---
title: "Newsletter July 2025"
date: 2025-07-22
categories: ["Newsletters"]
description: "Read the latest news and updates from the LMU Open Science Center in our July 2025 newsletter."
flyer:
    - file: "assets/newsletter_2025_july.pdf"
      title: LMU OSC Newsletter - July 2025

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---
